and kill stuff faster

Avoid spending too much energy shielding up if it's before a turn that you're about to release the bloodthirsty flail since getting low just means more healing from it
your sole survivability comes from just getting hp back from using balls
if your damage is not high enough to one turn 60k
then setup more
Just get enough shield to survive then heal it back
oh and you want this
Also if you see any relics that double play cards or if you have ways to get multiple flails in hand try to
Yeah
40% max hp so you can face tank more

Another question, i noticed some wheel have "Unique" and "Team Unique". Does the "Team Unique" effect actually apply to the team or is it just gpt synonym and still only apply to the equipped char?

Ex: Giant's blade that give 20% chance for card to have -1 cost
Unique just means only one effect of a wheel of the same name can apply at a time
Giant's Blade's effects only apply to the equipped character, so when the character exalts there's a 20% chance for each of their cards in hand to get discounted by 1
Unique and team unique are also the same just translation things
check the synonym list in gameplay discussion channel

okay
so
gelot is
a dps, healer, arith eater, requires no scaling (only gear etc)
90% of my arith goes to gelot
10% is early minion fights and early turns when i dont draw her cards
she basically doulbes her damage via her ult, which gets mutliplied further by using her ball
thonk
And it even heals you lost hp%
And you want to use the card a lot / dupe it because it does so much damage
So you basically stack multipliers on top of multipliers
So that your balls basically do way more than intended

Quick example, her ult makes so that your active damage is also applied as bleed (2x damage)
If you use her ball card, which triggers half of that bleed as *extra* damage, which affects all damage you have done before the ball
And every time you use it, you heal lost hp%
Gelot is extra silly, doesn't help that the support for the realm she's in is Thais who dupes cards
